title: ranunculus oblongus
intro: Ranunculus oblongus, commonly known as goldenseal, is a perennial plant native to North America with a history of medicinal use. The plant's rhizome, bark, and root contain berberine, a compound with antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which is responsible for its medicinal properties. The health benefits of goldenseal include its ability to combat infections, reduce inflammation, and support digestive health, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Goldenseal can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or capsule, and is often combined with other herbs in herbal preparations to enhance its effects.
